compiled_state.title: RED: Test ticket-graph.py single batch reduction
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

**What**: Add tests to tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py verifying that ticket-graph.py uses a single reduce_all_tickets call for link and deps operations:
- test_build_dep_graph_single_batch_scan: mock reduce_all_tickets, verify it is called exactly once during build_dep_graph (currently called 0 times — it uses per-ticket _reduce_ticket calls)
- test_find_direct_blockers_uses_preloaded_state: verify _find_direct_blockers uses pre-loaded state dict instead of per-ticket os.listdir scans
- test_compute_dep_graph_shares_state_across_children_and_blockers: verify children scan and blocker scan use the same pre-loaded state

**Test approach**: Mock reduce_all_tickets and _reduce_ticket to count calls. Assert reduce_all_tickets called once and _reduce_ticket called 0 times (for the batch path).

### Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- .test-index (add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (excluding RED)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test functions exist
  Verify: grep -q 'test_build_dep_graph_single_batch_scan' tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-graph.py.*test_ticket_graph.py.*test_build_dep_graph_single_batch_scan' .test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: 3 RED tests for single batch reduction
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
